mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.offer_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, product_name, supplier_id, supplier_name, offer_price, mrp, discount_percent, state_id, flow_id, created_at ) SELECT o.id, o.tenant, NOW(), o.product_id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), o.supplier_id, COALESCE(s.business_name, ''), o.offer_price, o.mrp, o.discount_percent, o.state_id, o.flow_id, o.created_time FROM hm_offer.offer o LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hm_supplier.supplier s ON o.supplier_id = s.id
